playbook.intent: One feature spec written end-to-end: problem, users, success metric, scope, out-of-scope, open questions; ready for engineering and design review.
playbook.scope: One feature spec written end-to-end: problem, users, success metric, scope, out-of-scope, open questions; ready for engineering and design review.

success-criteria.criterion: Problem framed in user terms with evidence
One primary metric with target band

stage.name: Problem
stage.intent: Frame the problem in user terms, not solution terms.

tasks.task: Name the user segment that owns the pain
Cite at least 2 evidence sources (interview, ticket, data)

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the problem is user-framed and evidenced.

stage.name: Success metric
stage.intent: Lock the metric the feature must move.

tasks.task: Pick one primary metric tied to the problem
Define the target band and read window

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the metric is one number with a target band.

stage.name: Scope cuts
stage.intent: Define what is in and out explicitly.

tasks.task: Cut to the smallest scope that moves the metric

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the non-goals list is non-empty and concrete.

stage.name: Open questions
stage.intent: Surface the unknowns before review, not during.

tasks.task: Assign an owner to each open question

stage.decision-gate: Advance when each open question has an owner and a check-back date.

stage.name: Acceptance + handoff

tasks.task: Write acceptance criteria per scope item
Walk the spec with engineering + design
Update based on feedback in one revision pass

stage.decision-gate: Required: a written 'accepted' note from at least one engineer and one designer.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content feature-brief-rfc-lite-writing-session --format md, agent: faion get-content feature-brief-rfc-lite-writing-session --format context, json: faion get-content feature-brief-rfc-lite-writing-session --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial v2 playbook drafted from F-059-063 chunk-04, role-manager-manager'}]
